programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: Like Arrows

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, laughs, adventures and osilly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Augustine thinks his mother's religion is foolishness so he ventures to a new life as 'The Voice of The Emperor'. He soon must choose whom to serve - his mother and Bishop Ambrose or angry soldiers.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.sub-title: Mary and Martha, Syrophoenician Woman, Sheep
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Lennie the Legend: An Epic Journey to the Bridge of Dreams

programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: The Engagement Plot

programme.desc: A fishing trip and FBI investigation are both underway. But in the end, they intersect at the same person.

programme.title: Smoketown

programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: To the Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Why people refuse to accept Christ. Luke 14 (Anaheim 1985).

programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Salem's Lot
programme.desc: A writer returns to his hometown and discovers that the residents are being turned into vampires.

programme.title: The Idaho Student Murders
programme.desc: Explores the rea - life horror that occurred in the idyllic town of Moscow, Idaho, where criminology student Bryan Kohberger faced four first-degree murder charges and the death penalty for the murder of four University students.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: AfrAId
programme.desc: The Curtis family tests a new digital assistant, AIA, which learns their behaviours and anticipates needs. But AIA's protective nature means nothing, or no one, will interfere with them.

programme.title: Salem's Lot
programme.desc: A writer returns to his hometown and discovers that the residents are being turned into vampires.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: During a train trip to New Delhi, a pair of commandos face an army of invading bandits.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob, is kidnapped and injected with microscopic computers, turning him into a superhuman. Escaping his makers, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Death Race 4: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: Connor Gibson, a Black Ops specialist, infiltrates a maximum security prison to enter the Death Race. A brutal world of no guards, no rules, no track, and no fear.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his father's death, Black Manta uses the Black Trident's power to become a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman must forge an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: Agents who monitor aliens must foil an intergalactic plot to prevent two worlds from colliding. It's just another typical day for the Men in Black crack team.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain and the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta: they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the universe.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Monkey Man

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7

programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up, but there's a glitch: she's financing her shopping with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Far from Heaven
programme.desc: Suburban America in the 1950s: a place where autumn leaves fall on cue, until scandal comes calling for a perfect wife.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: Romance ignites when a rip in time entwines a 19th century bachelor and a 21st century woman. The star-crossed lovers discover that passion and chivalry never go out of style.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: In this third instalment, Bridget's single life and career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant and unable to identify her baby's father.

programme.title: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A student is controlled by her wicked stepmother and stepsisters, but her anonymous email buddy is a real Prince Charming. Will she turn into a pumpkin when they finally meet at the school dance?

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Two best friends coming out of disastrous relationships, decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact. However, soon they begin to fall in love and must re-evaluate their feelings for each other.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: After discovering that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be, a 70-year-old widower seizes an opportunity to become a senior intern at an online fashion site.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.desc: Michael celebrates Phyllis' wedding shower by bringing two performers into the office: a stripper and a Ben Franklin impersonator. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past history with Jim.

programme.title: The World War: 1914-1945
programme.desc: The World War: 1914 - 1945 is an original and dramatic series that views the most violent and significant episodes in modern history from a fresh perspective.

programme.title: Russia's Wars
programme.desc: When Russia takes up arms, the world holds its breath. Over centuries, the immense empire has been shaped by battles won, and lost, and those who led the forces that fought in them.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?

programme.title: Night

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People

programme.title: Lone Star Law

programme.title: The Zoo

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN as we showcase hot products, offer sneak peeks, and present lively competitions. Enjoy vibrant and engaging mornings with TVSN!

programme.title: Oro Nuovo Gold with Daniele
programme.desc: Indulge in the irresistible Oro Nuovo collection, showcasing exquisite 14k gold pieces that blend quality, form, and design. Discover timeless elegance with these stunning jewellery pieces.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 2 of The Prayer of Jabez, Pastor Bayless explores the final three requests in Jabez's prayer.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You're not alone-His anointing rests on you to bring healing, hope, and heaven to earth.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever struggle with patience? Today, Joyce shares how patience, a fruit of the Spirit, can help you enjoy peace and contentment, even when life isn't going as planned.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Touching The Hearts Of The Next Generation/The Church: What Is It All About?
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: The Engagement Plot
programme.desc: After getting her hopes dashed on a dating show, Hanna has returned to her home town. But her life is rudely interrupted when the hunky bachelor who broke her heart shows up with an outrageous proposal.

programme.title: I Lived on Parker Avenue
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and raised in Louisiana, David Scotton is on a journey to meet the parents he's never known. I Lived on Parker Avenue is a short documentary about a young man's search for where his life began.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Fracturing the Falsehoods of the Fibbler
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: The Pinkies are Back
programme.desc: The story of a dragon boat team with 17 new members: mostly unfit, some overweight and all breast cancer survivors, who need to find their 'inner mongrel' super quick.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Sacred Sites of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You_Part 2 Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A look at the alien and UFO phenomenon from a Christian perspective.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever struggle with patience? Today, Joyce shares how patience, a fruit of the Spirit, can help you enjoy peace and contentment, even when life isn't going as planned.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mongolia
programme.desc: After her mother dies, Mya discovers an old photograph that sets her on a journey to find her long-lost father in the exotic deserts of Mongolia.

programme.title: Asbury Revival: Desperate for More
programme.desc: On February 8 2023, some students stayed after chapel at Asbury University and continued worshiping. And they kept going for 16 days.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Touching The Hearts Of The Next Generation/The Church: What Is It All About?
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie & Nate have just gotten engaged when Frankie's cousin & Nate's brother tell them that they're getting married on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You_Part 2 Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of grace, helping believers understand how greatly blessed and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.sub-title: The Truth is the Mane Thing
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about the references to water in the Bible. More specifically Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about the Pool of Siloam and how in the bible, peoples eyes were open there.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Launching, building and running a business can be an exciting undertaking. But even as many look on and see the success, sometimes behind that success is betrayal, lost friendships and relationships.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Sugar loaded episode all about treats.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: Famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris in the 1970s after a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Greece
programme.desc: France. When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece. (Subtitles)

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Six unruly kids wreak havoc and surprise during the town's annual Christmas performance, leaving no one prepared for the mayhem.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: Based on a remarkable true story, a mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called The Plastics. However, Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: It's -10 degrees in the Rocky Mountains and the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In this futuristic action, it's been 25 years since a wall was built around Scotland to halt the Reaper virus. Now, London's in danger and a cure must be found while up north anarchy is rife.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman unexpectedly gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home on a train.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: When a billionaire tech CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology, the mission becomes high risk when his daughter is kidnapped by a terrorist group.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends on a thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When evil Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette, the Smurfs and their human friends led by Patrick unite to help her escape the clutches of the Naughties.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: King Kong (2005)
programme.desc: The leading lady in a movie is abducted as a sacrifice for a giant ape in this jaw-dropping, triple Oscar-winning remake of the 1933 classic.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy wants is to start a new life with Ashley, the girl of his dreams, but between them and happiness stands her crazy brother and his motley crew of deadly criminals.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to MIB's early years in the 1960s to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a London museum guard sent to Los Angeles in charge of a priceless painting. Mayhem erupts when the famously eccentric simpleton is mistaken for an art expert.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: After trying hard to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad, Brad's plans turn upside down when the biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When they make a three-hour sex tape to spice up their love life, a husband and wife realise they're in trouble when the epic recording threatens to go viral! A delightfully crude comedy.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After doing time for insider trading, an entrepreneur wastes no time in devising a winner-take-all plan to rebuild her empire.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Tormented by their self-centred and cruel employers, three friends see no way of escaping but to kill their bosses, but carrying out their plans proves to be trickier than they thought.

programme.title: Last Vegas

programme.desc: James Moffat is joined on the pod by Tony D'Alberto and Lee Holdsworth. The trio discuss day jobs, who has the best hair on the grid, the impact of enduros on The Finals and more.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Sydney 500 Race 1
programme.desc: The Supercars action revs up for the first race under lights this weekend! The Sydney 500 marks the debut of the new Sprint Cup race format.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Sydney 500 Race 2
programme.desc: Cam Waters was perfect in the season opener, and chases Sydney domination when he starts at the front of the grid for the 200km Race 2.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Sydney 500 Race 3
programme.desc: As the sun sets on the final race of the Sydney 500, buckle up for a thrilling display of speed and skill with drivers racing another 200km into twilight at Sydney Motorsport Park.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Melbourne Race 4
programme.desc: Race 4 of the Supercars Championship begins at Albert Park as Cam Waters looks to build on his perfect start to the season.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Melbourne Race 5
programme.desc: After a narrow victory in Race 4, Broc Feeney starts on pole position for Race 5 as he eyes consecutive wins.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Melbourne Race 6
programme.desc: It's been a weekend to remember so far for Cam Hill, who is now a race winner and looking to go back-to-back in Race 6.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Taupo Race 8
programme.desc: Will Brown leads the Championship standings heading into the first sprint race of the weekend with Cam Waters and Broc Feeney hot on his tail.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Taupo Race 9
programme.desc: The second sprint race of the weekend begins from Taupo with more points up for grabs.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Taupo Race 10
programme.desc: After a dramatic qualifying session, Will Brown and Cam Waters have their work cut out in the final race of the weekend in Taupo.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Tasmania Race 11
programme.desc: After missing the podium in all three races at Taupo, Will Brown and Broc Feeney look to bounce back in Tasmania.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Tasmania Race 12
programme.desc: Race 12 kicks off at Symmons Plains Raceway, where every point is crucial amongst a tightly packed championship leaderboard.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Tasmania Race 13
programme.desc: A 200km refuelling showdown, gets underway at Symmons Plains Raceway as Round 4 of the Supercars Championship draws to a close.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Perth Race 14
programme.desc: Wanneroo Raceway becomes the first circuit in history to host 100 Supercars Championship races. Brodie Kostecki returns to his home track as he continues the search for his first win this season.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Perth Race 15
programme.desc: Current championship leader Broc Feeney is coming off a dominant weekend in Tasmania. Can he maintain his form, or will Matt Payne continue his impressive race performance?

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Perth Race 16
programme.desc: Cam Waters and Chaz Mostert will be looking for redemption after a tough run so far, and this could be the circuit where they kickstart their Sprint Cup hopes.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Darwin Race 17
programme.desc: The official Indigenous Round of the Supercars Championship celebrates the rich culture of the Top End. Broc Feeney holds a 72-point lead in the Championship, with Will Brown and Matt Payne looking to challenge for the top spot.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Darwin Race 18
programme.desc: Race 18 is set to begin with a tightly bunched leaderboard and multiple title contenders neck-and-neck. The combination of Darwin's heat and the layout of the Hidden Valley circuit make it one of the more challenging places to overtake.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Darwin Race 19
programme.desc: The Darwin Triple Crown wraps up with a 70 lap, 200-kilometre, two-stop race around Hidden Valley Raceway. Will the unpredictable nature of this circuit deliver a surprise winner?

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Townsville 500 Race 20
programme.desc: After dominating in Darwin, Broc Feeney has built a sizeable lead heading into the first of three races in Townsville. With two Sprint Cup rounds remaining, Feeney could clinch the Sprint Cup trophy as soon as this weekend.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Townsville 500 Race 21
programme.desc: Fresh off his recent stint in NASCAR, can reigning Supercars Champion Will Brown make it to a podium finish in Townsville?

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Townsville 500 Race 22
programme.desc: Penrite Racing's Matthew Payne will be aiming to taste success on the streets of Townsville once again as the final race of the weekend begins.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Ipswich Race 23
programme.desc: For the first time, the new Gen3 cars race at Queensland Raceway. All eyes will be on Broc Feeney, who holds a commanding 220-point lead in the Sprint Cup standings.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Ipswich Race 24
programme.desc: Drivers are under pressure to secure a top 10 position to qualify for the inaugural Finals Series. Will Brown and Matt Payne will be looking to close the gap and keep their championship aspirations alive.

programme.title: Supercars Mini: Ipswich Race 25
programme.desc: The final race of the weekend sees a driver crowned the inaugural Sprint Cup Champion.

programme.title: Julius Caesar: The Making Of A Dictator
programme.desc: The story of how Julius Caesar dismantles five centuries of Roman democracy in just 16 years.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Just 50km from Rome, Monte Soratte was Mussolini's bunker with Bond-style defences, built to withstand Allied attack.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Investigates Volkswagen Beetle designer Ferdinand Porsche, infamous architect Albert Speer, aerospace pioneer Wernher von Braun, and more.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Nazi Party
programme.desc: Once in power, Hitler moves swiftly to strengthen his hold on government and destroy his opponents. He promises his Nazi comrades that their Third Reich will last 1000 years.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The Marines take the Pacific atoll of Tarawa, at a terrible cost. Back home, Japanese-Americans are permitted to form a special segregated infantry unit, and begin to train for combat.

programme.title: WWII: The Price Of Empire
programme.desc: Japan's escalation of the war in the East proves effective, as Malaya and Singapore both fall. Also: the battles against American forces in the Coral Sea and at Midway.

programme.title: Dead Men's Secrets
programme.desc: As Allied tanks roared through the flaming ruins of Berlin, the most hated men in history hid in a bunker deep beneath the Reich Chancellery.

programme.title: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: State-of-the-art computer animation provides some of the highlights in this authoritative, entertaining look at the great German siege guns of WWII.

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The Roman fort at the end of Hadrian's Wall is a landmark, and the team try to locate the site of a Roman cemetery thought to be in the area. It's three days of mayhem before the answer emerges.

programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: How we choose to see adversity determines how we navigate it. This episode highlights the importance of facing adversity with optimism and hope for the future. With guest Monika Siemonek.

programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God has great opportunities lined up for you! Be encouraged to follow His lead anytime, even when it doesn't seem to make sense.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: We follow the ladies and Filipino Melbournian Kaye to The Philippines to work with an organisation called "Gawad Kalinga" - removing entire communities from slums of manila into safe housing.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Deeply practical and intensely personal, The Divine Adventure unpacks 12 powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, HAPPY DAY gets little ones celebrating God's amazing love for them.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Join in the incredible adventures of Christopher and Joy. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend, Gizmo.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Living The Dream
programme.desc: In the episode, Tori and Jason, renovate Southern Comfort from a junky old house that is falling apart to a spacious, elegant and comfortable design.

programme.title: TV4DADs
programme.desc: In Season 6 of the program, Brian teams up with his daughter Jeni (from Jeni:Seeking the Extraordinary) for an adventure in Florida that sees them catching fish, throwing axes, and being ambushed by killer birds.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels try a myriad of extravagant and eclectic dishes all around the city.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: My Why
programme.desc: Mywhy.tv is a project that is designed to bring the message of Jesus to the forefront of the pop culture conversation through the art of storytelling.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Craig and Earl enter Music City's "off brand" spaces inhabited by musicians and artists.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You_Part 2 Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand how greatly blessed and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: You're not alone-His anointing rests on you to bring healing, hope, and heaven to earth.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God has great opportunities lined up for you! Be encouraged to follow His lead anytime, even when it doesn't seem to make sense.

programme.title: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Becca is always a bridesmaid, but at her cousin's wedding she bonds with Kyle, the videographer covering every stage of the planning. Perhaps she won't be the last woman standing for long.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: Emma travels to Italy to teach and research a wedding veil said to bring its owner love. While there, she meets Paolo, the son of a local lace-making family.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Show Me The Father
programme.desc: An inspiring documentary which demonstrates through dozens of interviews with key influential figures just how vital the role of the father is for families as well as society as a whole.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You_Part 2 Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel. His desire is to help believers understand how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, enjoyable, life-changing and uplifting, Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Vlad Dracula - The Man, The Myth, The Monster?
programme.desc: Depending on the author, a hero can become a villain. Much is the case with the real-historical Vlad Dracula. FAKE NEWS turned him into a monster.

programme.title: An American in Austen
programme.desc: Harriet thinks that no man can compare to Mr Darcy, is transported into Pride and Prejudice and gets an chance to find out. Will the fantasy she's chasing get in the way of her real-life happy ending?

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: The Mountain Within Me
programme.desc: After suffering a spinal cord injury, professional rugby player Ed Jackson's world changes forever. Following Ed's journey on his recovery as he achieves the heights of Snowdonia, the Alps and Himalayas.

programme.title: Freediver
programme.desc: Freediver Alexey Molchanov tries to set five world records in under four months. His ambitious quest takes him to the farthest reaches of the globe and to the very edge of human performance.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: A young man embarks on a quest for vengeance against the corrupt leaders who murdered his mother and continue to systemically victimise the poor and powerless.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is back and now he's one of the good guys, assigned to protect freedom fighter John Connor from a cyborg sent by the leader of the human resistance in the future.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent is crushed when his wife and children are killed after witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to live for he becomes The Punisher, a one-man judge, jury, and executioner.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned, damaged and homeless, an ex-Special Forces commando is drawn into the violence and criminality of London's dangerous underworld.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: After trying hard to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad, Brad's plans turn upside down when the biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three friends try to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity much to the ire of Pritchard, a dean at the college who was the target of their abuse when they were all students.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and his loyal dog, Gromit, set out to discover the mystery behind the garden sabotage that plagues their village and threatens the annual giant vegetable growing contest.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law and other seniors as a way to make quick cash.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: In search of his next big story, Eddie lands an exclusive interview with convicted murderer Cletus Kasady, who discovers Eddie's secret and becomes the host for Carnage.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Death Race 4: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: Connor Gibson, a Black Ops specialist, infiltrates a maximum security prison to enter the Death Race. A brutal world of no guards, no rules, no track, and no fear.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: Gettin' Square
programme.desc: Barry has good intentions when he is released after eight years in prison, but finding a job is difficult with a prison record, and he can't keep his kid brother or his friend out of crime.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.desc: A one-night stand between a mismatched slacker and a career girl results in a pregnancy that leads to unlikely mutual support.

programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.desc: Jim and Pam go on a double date with Pam's mum and Michael. Dwight starts being nice to everyone in the office, hoping to gain favours owed to him.

programme.desc: Tyrannis is stuck in a time loop, trying to save the city.
