programme.title: An American in Austen
programme.desc: Harriet thinks that no man can compare to Mr Darcy, is transported into Pride and Prejudice and gets an chance to find out. Will the fantasy she's chasing get in the way of her real-life happy ending?

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God gives us the grace we need right now. Be encouraged to take on every challenge with peace, joy, and confidence because God is with you!

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Prayer is a great blessing from God, and as we bring our requests before God, we will see Him at work in answering them.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: A Thousand Tomorrows
programme.desc: Cody and Ali's relationship blossoms as they get to know each other. Tensions with their families continue to rise as the young rodeo stars fight for independence.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John tries to act as though everything is normal, but Abe is looking for someone to blame for the Potter family misfortunes.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals & abbeys found throughout England & Wales, featuring interviews with historians & experts & breathtaking footage.

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Follow Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his team on a 25,000km road trip from bush to beach, performing 78 evangelical concerts, sharing their journeys and experiencing what Australia has to offer.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Larry the Cucumber sings one of his special 'Silly Songs with Larry'. This video contains many of the most popular Silly Songs, hosted by The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything (who debut a Silly Song of their own).

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: A Canadian farmer takes on a giant corporation after their GMOs interfere with his crops.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 2 of The Prayer of Jabez, Pastor Bayless explores the final three requests in Jabez's prayer.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Uncovering The Enemy's Tactics Against You_Part 2 Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel. His desire is to help believers understand how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about the references to water in the Bible. More specifically Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches about the Pool of Siloam and how in the bible, peoples eyes were open there.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God gives us the grace we need right now. Be encouraged to take on every challenge with peace, joy, and confidence because God is with you!

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: A Canadian farmer takes on a giant corporation after their GMOs interfere with his crops.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, enjoyable, life-changing and uplifting, Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Prayer is a great blessing from God, and as we bring our requests before God, we will see Him at work in answering them.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A look at the alien and UFO phenomenon from a Christian perspective.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Fracturing the Falsehoods of the Fibbler
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Freediver
programme.desc: Freediver Alexey Molchanov tries to set five world records in under four months. His ambitious quest takes him to the farthest reaches of the globe and to the very edge of human performance.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: When their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a couple must spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorised by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: A man living at the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm. As the storm worsens, these solitary souls begin to feel threatened.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three friends try to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity much to the ire of Pritchard, a dean at the college who was the target of their abuse when they were all students.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a new recruit, they must learn to put their differences aside after uncovering a criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The worst team in the renegade American Basketball Association is on the brink of collapse, but can it rebound to salvation?

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two woefully immature men are forced to live as brothers when their parents decide to get hitched.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: A goofy pet detective is hired to track down Snowflake, the Miami Dolphins' mascot.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: When Santa's helpers at the mall stage a coup, closing the megaplex and taking hostages, Paul Blart leaps to the rescue. No longer just a mall guard, he becomes like a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk becomes a manic superhero when he stumbles upon a mysterious ancient mask.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: Happy doesn't just play golf, he destroys it. With the help of a retired golfer and hot publicist, can Happy perfect his game and tame his temper to win the tournament prize money?

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: A couple who lose their minds whilst trying to hold onto the elusive American dream, turn to crime to get back in the black and outwit a greedy, corporate executive.

programme.title: Father Figures
programme.desc: After discovering their father didn't die when they were young, two brothers set off to find him. They end up learning more about their mother than they ever wanted to know.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks have moved on from delivering babies to packages. But when an order for a baby appears, the best delivery stork must scramble to fix the error by delivering the baby.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: The Swan Princess: A Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Join Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their royal friends as they set sail for another magical adventure in the enchanted land of Cathay.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent is crushed when his wife and children are killed after witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to live for he becomes The Punisher, a one-man judge, jury, and executioner.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: The most determined of all vigilantes in Marvel Comics wages a no-holds-barred, one-man war against a horribly disfigured crime lord called Jigsaw.

programme.title: Halloween Kills
programme.desc: Survivors of Michael Myer's first rampage decide to take matters into their own hands, forming a vigilante mob that sets out to hunt Michael down, once and for all.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: A freak lab accident reveals Bruce's heroic impulses, but also unleashes his inner demons, and he becomes the most powerful being on the face of the Earth: a superhero and a monster.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane brings his brazen humour to the screen when a grown man must deal with the loved teddy bear that came to life from a childhood wish and has refused to leave since.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: A man must attend night school classes alongside a group of oddballs in order to earn his much needed diploma.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.desc: One of the 20th century's most influential women, Margaret Thatcher smashed through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world.

programme.desc: The life of Mary Quant, the designer often credited with the invention of the mini skirt, chronicling her rise from a fashion-conscious tomboy to a daring avant-garde designer.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael enlists Dwight's help when he thinks Donna may be cheating. Andy can't get people in the office to help with a customer complaint.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: The office staff is shocked that Michael seems ready to continue seeing Donna despite having learned that she's married. Jim and Pam's sleep deprivation from their baby leaves them exhausted.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: When Sabre CEO Jo Bennett returns to Scranton to get to the bottom of who told the press about their printers catching on fire, suspicion falls on Andy.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A new assistant's incompetence has the Dunder Mifflin staff up in arms, but Michael refuses to fire him, as he's his nephew. Andy tries to ignore Erin's dating of Gabe.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael is subjected to counselling with Toby. When a Steamtown Mall merchant snubs Dwight, he goes out for revenge. Pam wants a new job title.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Having invited the whole office, Andy hopes his local theatre troupe's production of Sweeney Todd will be a chance to impress Erin.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A cold sore leads to Michael contacting all his old girlfriends telling them he has herpes. Meanwhile, Andy hosts a sex ed forum for the staff.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael, Jim, and Dwight run a scam to discover why a competing salesman from a smaller rival company in Throop is so successful. Meanwhile, Andy forms a band.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin staff have a Halloween costume contest. Michael's upset after Darryl gives an idea to corporate without running it by him first.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Cecelia's christening is overcrowded due to Michael inviting the entire office staff.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Hoping to get Gabe and Michael to be more friendly to one another, Erin organises a Glee viewing party for the staff. Meanwhile, Andy's jealousy over Erin and Gabe's relationship intensifies.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael helps Ryan generate capital for his Wuphf service. Dwight hosts a Thanksgiving hay festival in the parking lot. Jim learns he's run up against a Sabre sales commission cap.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Hearing of China's surging as an economic superpower convinces Michael that America desperately needs a new idea to keep pace. Pam suggests it might be time for Dunder Mifflin to move.

programme.desc: Michael awaits news of how Holly's ultimatum to AJ demanding a proposal was received. Pam gets the office to share their resolutions.
